scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c "#14b8a6,#f97316" "npm run dev --workspace frontend" "npm run dev --workspace backend"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace frontend && npm run build --workspace backend
scripts.start: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c "#14b8a6,#f97316" "npm run start --workspace frontend" "npm run start --workspace backend"
